dct_title_s: Study of Alternative Locations for Pathway Lighting suggested for Serra Street Corridor from Campus Drive to El Camino Real, 1979
dct_description_sm: Map depicting study of alternative locations for pathway lighting suggested for Serra Street Corridor from Campus Drive to El Camino Real. Prepared by Stanford University Planning Office, 28 Jun 1979, OFN Jr. Scale: 1"=100'.
dct_rights_sm: Property rights reside with the repository. Literary rights reside with  the creators of the documents or their heirs. To obtain permission to publish or reproduce, please contact the Public Services Librarian of the Dept. of Special Collections (http://library.stanford.edu/spc).
